name: Tricky Witch
author: Poki
description: Tricky Witch is a magical platformer where you play as a clever witch on a mission to rescue people trapped inside chests! Explore tricky levels, drink potions to unlock powerful spells, and switch abilities on the fly! Just remember, you can only use one spell at a time. Choose wisely, master your powers, and solve each challenge with skill and timing. Ready to cast spells and save the day? How to play Tricky Witch? Jump: W or the up arrow key Move: A/D or left and right arrow keys Use the spell: K or the space bar Who created Tricky Witch? Tricky Witch is created by eddynardo. This is their first game on Poki! How can I play Tricky Witch for free? You can play Tricky Witch for free on Poki. Can I play Tricky Witch on mobile devices and desktop? Tricky Witch can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets.
